items.title: Procter & Gamble (PG) valuation check as restructuring, CEO transition and new product pushes reshape investor expectations
items.description: Procter & Gamble (PG) has a lot happening at once, from a sweeping restructuring and CEO change to splashy brand tie ups and a fresh Febreze product push, all while options activity heats up. See our latest analysis for Procter & Gamble. Even with the restructuring, brand partnerships, and dividend story in focus, the stock has been under pressure. The year to date share price return is negative 16.65 percent, and the five year total shareholder return is 15.4 percent. This suggests long term...

items.title: Premium Guard Inc. Announces Licensing Partnership with Procter & Gamble to Launch Febreze™ Cabin Air Filters
items.description: Premium Guard Inc. (PGI), a leading manufacturer and supplier of high-quality automotive filtration products, announced a new licensing agreement with Procter & Gamble (P&G) to develop, distribute and sell Febreze™ Cabin Air Filters powered by PUREFLOW® Air Filtration Technology — bringing to market the trusted brand equity of Febreze with PUREFLOW®'s proven performance to redefine vehicle interior air quality (ViAQ™).
